prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical beachside portrait of a young East Asian woman kneeling on a soft bed beside an open ocean-view window on a bright tropical morning. She wears a wide frayed straw sunhat with long white lace ties, has dark brown hair in a loose side braid with wispy bangs, and gazes calmly off to the right with a natural, sunlit expression. Her outfit is a delicate pale pink floral sundress with thin straps and a deep gathered neckline, rendered as tasteful summer fashion. Add dappled shadows from the straw hat across her face, shoulders, arms, and dress, with glossy warm skin highlights. The bed has white sheets and a rumpled pink polka-dot blanket. Include exactly 2 cats resting on the bed in the lower left: one black-and-white cat partly behind her and one orange tabby sleeping in front. On the left edge, include a sheer white lace curtain with floral embroidery, softly backlit. Through the large window show turquoise ocean water, white surf, pale sand, a blue sky with puffy clouds, and a small palm-covered headland on the right. Use realistic DSLR-style photography, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp natural details, high dynamic range sunlight, relaxed tropical vacation mood, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark.
